import { NationalPortalHomepage } from '@ethds/templates';

  <NationalPortalHomepage

    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    popularServices={[
      { href: '/renew-id', label: 'Renew ID' },
      { href: '/pay-tax', label: 'Pay tax' },
      { href: '/passport', label: 'Passport' },
      { href: '/business', label: 'Business licence' },

    categories={[

      { href: '/category/business', label: 'Business & trade' },
      { href: '/category/health', label: 'Health & education' },

    news={[
      { href: '/news/1', label: 'New office hours starting Meskerem' },
      { href: '/news/2', label: 'Online passport renewal now available' },
    ]}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

The top-level entry point to government online — leads with search and
the most-used services (start with citizen needs, not an org chart);
categories help browsing when a citizen doesn't know the exact service
name.

```tsx
import { NationalPortalHomepage } from '@ethds/templates';

<NationalPortalHomepage
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  onSearch={(query) => { /* … */ }}
  popularServices={popularServices} // the genuinely most-used, named in the citizen's own words
  categories={categories}
  news={news}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this as the single national entry point that links out to every
ministry's and agency's own homepage.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`, a search landmark (`role="search"`), and the standard
  `Header`/`Footer` chrome with a skip link.
- Popular services render as prominent cards; categories and news render
  as plain lists — the two shouldn't compete visually.
- All headings and link labels are a `labels`/data prop, translatable per
  locale.

## Plain HTML

Reuses [Header](/docs/components/header#plain-html),
[Search](/docs/components/search#plain-html), and
[Footer](/docs/components/footer#plain-html)'s markup, laid out with the
12-column grid utility documented in
[docs/brand/grid.md](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/docs/brand/grid.md).
See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/national-portal-homepage.md#html-example)
for the full page and grid CSS.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` (default `'Government of Ethiopia'`) | No |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `onSearch` | `(query: string) => void` | No |
| `popularServices` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `categories` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `news` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<NationalPortalHomepageLabels>` | No |
